title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BSNL Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BSNL Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BSNL Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Bhopal-based team.

About BSNL Advisory Limited:
BSNL Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL Advisory Limited!
